title: Mucin biotinylation - Hydrazide biotin reagent
steps: Prepare these buffers first: - Oxidation buffer consisting of 0.1 M sodium acetate, pH 5.5 - Coupling buffer consisting of PBS with pH 7.4
Then prepare these solutions: - 2mg/ml mucin in oxidation buffer - 20 mM sodium periodate in oxidation buffer
Mix the mucin solution with the sodium periodate solution at a 1:1 (volume) ratio. Incubate at 4 ºC for 30 minutes.
Exchange the buffer for coupling buffer by overnight dialysis.
Prepare 50 mM hydrazide biotin reagent in DMSO.
To 9 parts of the mucin solution, add 1 part of the biotin reagent. Mix for 2 hours at RT.
Exchange the buffer for water by overnight dialysis.
Transfer the mucin solution to a tube, freeze and then freeze-dry.
creator: Victoria Linderberg
